prompt: A vertical realistic photo. In a Japanese apartment-style dining kitchen with warm morning sunlight, a woman in her 20s stands slightly left of the center, brewing hand-drip coffee while facing away from the camera. The full body is included, occupying about 70% of the screen. A kitchen counter is on the left, and a wooden dining table and chairs are on the right. She has fair skin leaning towards ivory beige with a smooth texture and a hint of pink. Soft highlights fall on her cheeks, nose, shoulders, collarbone, and back, retaining natural texture without excessive skin correction. The makeup is precise and elegant, doll-like Japanese style. She wears simple, sophisticated swimwear-style loungewear based on coffee colors. The main light is soft, warm morning sun coming from the large window on the right. Shot with an 85mm lens at waist to chest height from a diagonal rear angle, focusing on the person and hands brewing coffee with a shallow depth of field. A magazine-style quiet and elegant finish.
promptEn: A vertical realistic photo. In a Japanese apartment-style dining kitchen with warm morning sunlight, a woman in her 20s stands slightly left of the center, brewing hand-drip coffee while facing away from the camera. The full body is included, occupying about 70% of the screen. A kitchen counter is on the left, and a wooden dining table and chairs are on the right. She has fair skin leaning towards ivory beige with a smooth texture and a hint of pink. Soft highlights fall on her cheeks, nose, shoulders, collarbone, and back, retaining natural texture without excessive skin correction. The makeup is precise and elegant, doll-like Japanese style. She wears simple, sophisticated swimwear-style loungewear based on coffee colors. The main light is soft, warm morning sun coming from the large window on the right. Shot with an 85mm lens at waist to chest height from a diagonal rear angle, focusing on the person and hands brewing coffee with a shallow depth of field. A magazine-style quiet and elegant finish.
promptZh: 一张竖构图的写实照片。在充满温暖晨光的日式公寓风格餐厨空间中，一位 20 多岁的女性 站在画面中心偏左的位置，背对镜头正在进行手冲咖啡。全身入镜，人物占据画面约 70%。左侧为厨房操作台，右侧为木质餐桌椅。她拥有 偏象牙米色的白皙皮肤，肤质细腻且透着淡淡的粉色。柔和的高光落在她的脸颊、鼻梁、肩膀、锁骨和背部，保留了自然的纹理，没有过度磨皮。妆容精致优雅，呈现日系娃娃风格。她穿着基于 咖啡色系 的简约高级泳装风格家居服。主光源为来自右侧大窗户的柔和暖晨光。使用 85mm 镜头，从斜后方腰部至胸部高度拍摄，焦点对准人物及冲泡咖啡的手部，具有浅景深效果。呈现出杂志般安静优雅的质感。
